title: Collections stuck fetching due to npm package interference
symptom: The collections from various integrations like Supabase and Xano are not loading and remain in a fetching state.
applies_when: Using WeWeb with integrations like Supabase or Xano
not_this_if: No custom npm packages are installed
Collections fetch successfully without custom scripts
root_cause: The presence of custom npm packages can interfere with the normal operation of WeWeb's data fetching mechanisms, causing collections to get stuck in a fetching state.
fix_steps: Identify and remove any custom npm packages that were recently added
Test the collections fetching again to ensure they load properly
agent_instruction: Remove any custom npm packages that may be causing the issue and test the collections fetching again.
